title: Ear pain follow-up in child
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

referral.text: Requires review for rapid worsening or systemic illness and identifies severe infection and acute complications including mastoiditis for hospital assessment.
referral.rationale: Supports rapid worsening, systemic illness and complication referral context for child ear-pain follow-up; no decision is generated.

curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
